tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Intro]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]


[Verse 1]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]G7[/ch]
You don't need to laugh so hard[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]
You don't have to wear a tie[/tab]
[tab][ch]E7[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
Sometimes honest is being caught inside a lie[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
And I have been there, I have been there[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]G[/ch]             [ch]G7[/ch]          [ch]C[/ch]
If I'd lived an easy life, would I still choose you?[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]
Would I fall on the same knife?[/tab]
[tab]  [ch]E7[/ch]                                  [ch]Am[/ch]
A rodeo queen breathing fire into the night[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I have been there, man I've been there[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Edim[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
What do you say, we set the pleasantries aside?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G#dim[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Even the diamonds look like rocks to the untrained eye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Edim[/ch]                          [ch]A7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]D/C[/ch]
What does it cost to buy your soul back when you die?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/C[/ch]         [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
What are the angels gonna do with you and I,   I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
What'll the angels do with you and I?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Blame the end of days, Mercury in retrograde[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Who believes in angels anyway?[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]    [ch]G[/ch]                   [ch]G7[/ch]
The color of the lie is white[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]C[/ch]                     [ch]G[/ch]
I would die on that hill in a one-handed fight[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]E7[/ch]                                        [ch]Am[/ch]
If you're not swinging first, you were never in the right[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
I have been there, man I've been there[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]            [ch]Edim[/ch]            [ch]A7[/ch]            [ch]Dm[/ch]
What do you say, we set the pleasantries aside?[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]G#dim[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]                      [ch]Am[/ch]
Even the diamonds look like rocks to the untrained eye[/tab]
[tab][ch]Edim[/ch]                          [ch]A7[/ch]                 [ch]Dm[/ch]   [ch]D/C[/ch]
What does it cost to buy your soul back when you die?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm/C[/ch]         [ch]G#[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]Am[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch]
What are the angels gonna do with you and I,   I[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]
What'll the angels do with you and I?[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Blame the end of days, Mercury in retrograde[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
Who believes in angels anyway? (I know)[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]          [ch]A7[/ch]
Blame the end of days, Mercury in retrograde[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Who believes in angels anyway?[/tab]


[Instrumental]
[ch]G[/ch] [ch]G7[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]Cm[/ch]


[Verse 3]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]G7[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
There's no need to curse the stars or bite before you bark[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]E7[/ch]                               [ch]Am[/ch]
But when you need someone to walk with in the dark[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]D[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]
I have been there, I have been there[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab]     [ch]D[/ch]
I've been there (I've been there)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]
Man, I've been there[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
Oh-oh-oh, been there[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]C[/ch]
Oh, been there[/tab]

Man, I've been there
[tab]          [ch]D[/ch]
I've been there, I've been there[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
I've[/tab]
